title: centratherum chinense
intro: Centratherum chinense, also known as Chinese buttonbush or buttonbush, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and inflammation, due to its medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and analgesic effects. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Herbal preparations of Centratherum chinense include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of fever, arthritis, and other inflammatory conditions.
